title: Friendly Chatbot Greeting
scenario: Write a greeting that a friendly chatbot might use to welcome users to a support platform. The greeting should be short, concise, and include a call-to-action to start a conversation. The tone should be approachable and non-threatening.

evaluationCriteria.description: Is the greeting friendly and non-threatening?
Does the greeting meet all the constraints (word count and required words)?
Does the greeting include a call-to-action?
Is the tone of the greeting approachable?
